note: Final curated schedule confirmed by Dr. Chang in Session D. Includes backup options preserved from draft. 3 sessions swapped from draft: Wed 15:00 → Calcified LM Learning Room, Thu 10:45 → Bifurcation Learning Room (new), Thu 15:00 → Complication Simulation. Tue 16:30 changed from HI-PEITHO to Bifurcation DCB symposium.

registrationAlerts.action: Go to Training Village desk first thing Thursday morning to register
registrationAlerts.reason: Hands-On Lab seats are first-come, first-served (~18 spots per session)

replayPlan.title: Major Late-Breaking Trials
replayPlan.reason: Attending in person but review replay for details missed

replayPlan.title: New evidence for coronary revascularisation (Hotline)
replayPlan.reason: Skipped for INOCA originally, then chose Bifurcation Learning Room. 5 presentations including FFR 10yr IPD + TUXEDO 2 PCI vs CABG diabetics

replayPlan.title: INOCA — Escaned + Berry
replayPlan.reason: Chose Bifurcation Learning Room instead. ESC Class I new recommendation, case discussion format

replayPlan.title: HI-PEITHO PE landmark RCT discussion
replayPlan.reason: Swapped for Bifurcation DCB. Data already published NEJM Mar 2026, read paper + watch replay

days.theme: LIVE immersion day — top operators, technique observation, bifurcation DCB

pick.title: Welcome to EuroPCR 2026
pick.note: 開幕式，確認場地方位，拿大會資料

pick.title: TAVI: LIVE Educational Case from Clinique Pasteur
pick.note: Toulouse團隊TAVI LIVE。開場設定學習基調。

pick.title: PCI of left main stenosis: LIVE from Sant'Andrea University Hospital
pick.note: 雙S級——Lassen（歐洲分叉教父）+ Stankovic（左主幹先驅）操刀。為Wed LBT左主幹IPD打基礎。

pick.title: LIVE case: Complex multivessel disease management
pick.note: Fajadet是EuroPCR共同創辦人，全球複雜冠脈PCI教科書級人物。教學密度極高。

backups.title: How to become a CHAMPION in LAA closure

pick.title: Physiology-guided PCI: LIVE from Sant'Andrea University Hospital
pick.note: ORBITA/ORBITA-2 PI Al-Lamee即時做physiology決策，配Gonzalo影像判讀。

blocks.draftPick: TUE-1630-251-002 (IVUS+NIRS) → then TUE-1630-252B-002 (HI-PEITHO) → final: Bifurcation DCB

pick.title: Evolving bifurcation: DCB, angio-based FFR and side branch optimisation
pick.note: Stankovic+Lassen雙S + DCB之父Scheller。EBC DCB trial更新 + ostial LCx (Medina 0,0,1)策略 + CathWorks FFRangio無導絲生理學。45分鐘高密度。

backups.title: IVUS and NIRS imaging: improve outcomes
HI-PEITHO PE landmark discussion
backups.note: Konstantinides。數據已發表NEJM 2026/3，看回放即可

days.theme: Peak day — paradigm shift + LBT + calcification mastery + structural frontier

pick.title: Rethinking coronary artery disease: from ischaemia to atheroma (Lancet Commission)
pick.note: Lancet Commission聯合場次。Peter Libby（動脈粥樣硬化教父）+ Al-Lamee ORBITA視角 + Gonzalo case discussion。改變PCI適應症思考。

backups.title: CTO BASIC LIVE
backups.note: Escaned(S) CTO教學，但Level I偏基礎

pick.title: ★ Major Late-Breaking Trials from EuroPCR 2026 ★
trials: Scarsini: TAVI coronary IPD meta-analysis (4 RCTs, n=1476)
Bergmark: Left main PCI vs CABG 10yr mortality IPD (4 RCTs)
Nielsen-Kudsk: CHAMPION-AF age subgroup (LAA vs NOAC)
pick.note: 三大LBT。Bergmark左主幹IPD對你最相關。回放可重看。

pick.title: Calcified coronary: LIVE from Clinique Pasteur
pick.note: Fajadet(S)操刀鈣化病變全程90分鐘。放棄同時段TAVI H2H（Leon S），因TAVI目前碰不到。

pick.title: Left main PCI: how Ultreon 3.0 can improve decision making
pick.note: 三位A級左主幹/影像專家。OCT/IVUS在左主幹實務應用，呼應上午LBT左主幹IPD。

backups.title: Renal denervation 360°
backups.note: Al-Lamee(S)+Mahfoud(S) 雙S，全會議唯一雙S對談

pick.title: High-def IVUS-guided strategies in calcified stenosis
pick.note: 四位A級影像專家。IVUS鈣化策略是日常PCI最需要的技能。

pick.title: Calcified left main — Do it well, do it safely
pick.format: Learning Room — small group case discussion + open Q&A
pick.note: Barbato facilitator。鈣化左主幹安全處理。小組互動，LM+calcification雙重興趣命中。

pick.title: Beyond COAPT: advancing mitral TEER for Asian anatomy
pick.note: MitraClip發明者談亞洲解剖TEER策略。Structural前瞻佈局，對台灣場景直接相關。

days.theme: Deep dive — DCB frontiers, bifurcation mastery, hands-on skills, LM closure

pick.title: ★ DCB in de novo lesions: SELUTION DeNovo + OPTIMAL ★
pick.note: SELUTION DeNovo新亞組分析 + OPTIMAL首次發表。DCB取代DES是未來5年最大paradigm shift。

backups.title: Routine primary PCI: what can go wrong?

pick.title: Is DCB the new gold standard for side branch in bifurcation?
discussants: S. L. Chen (陳紹良, DK Crush inventor)
pick.note: Case-based。Paradies教upfront DCB技巧，Hildick-Smith(EBC MAIN PI)談FBI after DCB，陳紹良帶來亞洲分叉觀點。學歐洲DCB實務的最佳場次。

blocks.draftPick: none (new addition, was 30min partial → upgraded to full session)

pick.title: Provisional strategy for non-left main true bifurcation lesion
pick.format: Learning Room — small group, drop-in supported
pick.note: Stankovic(S) facilitator。Provisional策略優化+何時升級two-stent。小組互動，bifurcation核心技能。

pick.title: ★ LIVE case: Left main and complex bifurcation stenting ★
pick.note: Stankovic(S)操刀左主幹+複雜分叉。全會議LM LIVE巔峰場次。

blocks.registrationRequired: Go to Training Village desk FIRST THING Thursday morning — only ~18 spots, first-come first-served

pick.title: Complication management in calcified lesions (entrapment, perforation)
pick.format: Calcium Skills Lab — hands-on simulation, 3 participants per station
pick.note: 鈣化PCI併發症模擬：burr entrapment + perforation處理。動手操作，教練一對三指導。⚠️ 早上先去Training Village登記！

backups.title: TAVI durability — Leon(S), Capodanno(A), Dumonteil(A)
backups.note: 原首選。TAVI目前碰不到，回放補。

pick.title: Ambiguous left main lesions: assess severity and decide
pick.note: Lassen(S)談模糊左主幹病變的severity評估和決策。每天都遇到的問題。三天的完美收尾。

backups.title: Complex bifurcation PCI LIVE from Leipzig (16:30)
